source.title: The Gammas - NMA project
source.revision_id_note: Not captured: the Drive connector exposes file metadata but not the revisions collection. Identify this snapshot by modified_at_utc plus the export hashes below.

download.export_consistency: Both exports were taken after the 13:35:54Z edit and before any later one, so they render the same revision: 18 pages in the PDF, 18 slides in the PPTX, both 720x405 pt.
download.concurrent_editing_warning: The deck was being edited live while this snapshot was taken; modified_at advanced three times within the hour (12:26:42Z, 13:20:29Z, 13:35:54Z). A first PDF export at 13:22Z was discarded because it predated the 13:35:54Z edit. Always re-read modified_at after exporting: a snapshot of a shared Google file is only as frozen as the minute it was pulled.

delta_since_previous_snapshot.summary: Jaime Pineda transcribed the final storyboard into the deck. Slides 3-11 are now the spoken core (intro, method schematic, primary result, the turn, conclusion) plus four backup slides and a references/guardrails slide. Valeria Moraga's original placeholder slides were pushed down and survive as the legacy tail: 12 (aims + 'FC Reconfiguration Explanation???'), 13 (Conclusion 1/2, L1/L2), 14 (IMPORTANT CONCEPTS), 15 (her reference list). Slide 18 is an internal compression map that must not ship.

review_state_at_snapshot.numerical_verdict: Every value on slides 3-11 matches canonical_evidence.EXPECTED; the transcription introduced no numeric error.
already_applied: Slide 3: 'as a different claims' corrected to 'are different claims'
Slide 4: plain-language FC-reconfiguration definition added under the title, answering Valeria Moraga's source-slide-7 question
Slide 5: the left-cropped transfer scatter was reinserted uncropped; the y-axis title and tick labels are legible again
Slide 6: the regenerated activation-robustness chart is in place, so the predictor now reads 'FC reconfiguration' instead of the misleading 'dFC pattern'
Slide 6: the missing 'Open squares' legend line was added
Slide 7: the title semicolon was restored
still_open: Slide 2 (blocker): five stock portraits and the dummy roles Actor / Doctor / Accountant / Chef / Journalist are still present; the pod and TA line is still missing
Slide 6: 'Activation contrast: 0.600 +/- 0.016' is pale sand on a pale ground
Slides 12-15: Valeria Moraga's legacy slides, pending her agreement before removal or merge
Slides 17-18: empty duplicate divider and the internal compression map, both safe to delete
Slide 11 vs 15: two parallel bibliographies, pending a team decision

usage.role: Frozen state of the shared team deck during the 23 Jul content review
usage.warning: This is a record of what was reviewed, not a corrected deck. See review_state_at_snapshot.still_open.
